contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 25
- Description: Handoff protocol overview doc (LLMs ↔ Sophia ↔ humans) with mermaid flows
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/373
  
  Details:
  Authored HANDOFF_PROTOCOL_OVERVIEW.md in agentic_ai_context (PR #373): a human-readable map of the full handoff protocol across local LLMs (Claude/Cursor/Kimi/Codex), Sophia (autopilot), and human governors. Covers the actors & interfaces (terminal, GitHub = durable source of truth, ping_sophia = trigger-not-bridge, Telegram = live coordination + GO convention), and three mermaid diagrams: the end-to-end handoff sequence; the 'go for it' execution/gating flow (verify → smoke test → map-before-delete → open PR → auto-merge-vs-park-for-review); and the three human touchpoints (initiate in terminal / authorize via Telegram 'go for it' / review+merge PRs + account-only actions). Documents the Definition-of-Done gates and current limitations (Sophia posts only to topics she creates/has seen; ping reply is the HTTP Sophia, not the Telegram session). Cross-links SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md, GITHUB_AGENTIC_AI_SSH.md, OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS.md §5. Added an orientation pointer from SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 41.67

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
